{{Infobox technique
| name = Script
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Script consists of patterns or shapes used to guide [[vital aura]], reshaping it to achieve specific purposes. Rather than being a divine language, script functions by directing the flow of [[aura]] through carved or drawn symbols. These can be etched into various surfaces, including wood, [[stone]], dirt, glass, or fabric, and may even be found on clothing. While a script is essentially a two-dimensional drawing of letters or runes, it can be used to activate more complex and permanent structures known as [[binding{{!}}bindings]], which are described as having greater depth and weight. [[scripts{{!}}Scripts]] can be powered by a user's [[spirit]] or [[madra]]. They serve a wide range of functions, such as generating light, creating defensive wards to catch or eject energy, providing concealment by dispersing spiritual senses, or acting as control arrays. Some [[scripts]] are designed to trigger specific effects upon contact or movement, while others can be used to activate the abilities of [[binding{{!}}bindings]] or [[constructs]]. The complexity of a script can vary from simple, rough symbols to intricate, multi-layered circles that resemble wheels within wheels. If a script is not broken instantly, attempting to disrupt it may cause the effect to trigger prematurely.}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Script]] consists of runes that are shapes used to guide [[vital aura]] in the air to reshape it for a new purpose.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c7">''Unsouled'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|A [[Script{{!}}script]] can be constructed using small tiles etched with runes or sigils to function as a full-size [[script-circle{{!}}script circle]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c9">''Unsouled'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Soulsmith ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|A [[Script{{!}}script]] can gather or push away [[vital aura]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c4">''Soulsmith'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Lines of [[Script{{!}}script]] on the wall provide light and are fully powered.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c17">''Soulsmith'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|A scarlet [[Script{{!}}script]] encircles the cave entrance.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10">''Blackflame'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Ghostwater ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The hatch is protected by hidden rings of [[Script{{!}}script]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c16">''Ghostwater'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
